sql.if: and (c.product_title like concat('%',#{key},'%') or c.id like concat('%',#{key},'%') )

mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_group_open a left join lkt_order `order` on `order`.sno=a.sno inner join lkt_group_activity b on a.activity_id=b.id inner join lkt_product_list c on c.id = a.goods_id inner join lkt_user d on d.user_id= a.user_id
select count(1) from lkt_group_open a inner join lkt_group_activity b on a.activity_id=b.id inner join lkt_product_list c on c.id = a.goods_id inner join lkt_user d on d.user_id= a.user_id

select count(1) from lkt_order a inner join lkt_order_details b on a.sno=b.r_sno and a.recycle=b.recycle inner join lkt_group_open `open` on `open`.sno=a.sno inner join lkt_group_activity ac on `open`.activity_id=ac.id inner join lkt_configure attr on attr.id=b.sid inner join lkt_product_list c on c.id = attr.pid left join lkt_mch mch on mch.id=c.mch_id
